title: Eating Animation Resource Pack
description: Adds an eating animation to all consumables items.
body:
This resource pack adds an eating animation to all consumable items. This is now possible from the resourcepack item model changes from 1.21.4 snapshots. No mods are required for this as long as you are in a version above 1.21.4.

Vote for [this bug](https://report.bugs.mojang.com/servicedesk/customer/portal/2/MC-278156) in order for it to work better in multiplayer

## Showcase
![Eating an Apple Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xOCLHTN8/images/174de2951c9ca2962a3648546cfe046d13c125b9.gif)

## Other Information
If you want to use your own custom eating textures, override the textures in this pack with your own textures

Item textures are inspired by the ones from the [Eating Animation Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation)

[![Sparked host sponsor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fdc990911fad7d2e86556421b70f72ab56ab3a6_0.webp)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3158)
